description.cn: 引擎调度单元状态错误
存储单元中无可用空间

description.en: more than one field has array
description.cn: 超过一个索引字段包含数组

description.en: two records get same key and rid
description.cn: 两条记录拥有同样的键值和RID

description.en: log was not found in log buf
log was not found in log file

description.cn: 系统引擎调度单元不可被终止

description.en: reorg file is in read only mode
collection is not in reorg state
the member is not in this group
updated information is same as old one
data node have no catalog info
description.cn: 数据节点不存在编目信息
数据节点编目版本过旧
协调节点编目版本过旧
数据文件空间管理段错误

description.en: get failed msg from the node

description.cn: 协调节点接收到集合结尾消息

description.en: DPS file size are not the same
data to pipe is too big

description.cn: 协调节点分配数据节点失败

description.en: there is no node-group register in catalogue-node

description.cn: 无法找到匹配的协调节点信息

description.en: received invalid request which opcode is unknowned
coord couldn't find the group-info in local
description.cn: 协调节点无法找到本地节点组信息

description.en: remote engines have been stopped partially
description.cn: 远程引擎已部分被停止

description.en: sdb service has already been started
dms state is not compatible with current command
description.cn: dms状态与当前请求不兼容

description.en: there is no data in the coord-node's cache
description.cn: 协调节点的缓存中无数据

description.en: errors occur during the process of evalution
The operation is for coord node only
description.cn: 该操作仅适用于协调节点

description.en: failed to operate on node only
description.cn: 在节点上执行操作失败

description.en: The specified job does not exist
The command can't be run in the node
description.cn: 该节点不能运行该命令

description.en: The command can't be run in the serice plane
description.cn: 该服务平面不能运行该命令

description.en: The record does not contains valid sharding key
description.cn: 记录不包含合法的分区键

description.en: A task that already exists does not compatible with the new task
description.cn: 存在一个不兼容的任务

description.en: The collection does not exists on the specified group
description.cn: 集合在指定复制组中不存在

description.en: The specified task does not exist
The record contains more than one sharding key
description.cn: 记录包含超过一条分区键

description.en: The split key is not valid or not in the source group
description.cn: 指定的分区键不合法或不在源节点范围内

description.en: The unique index must include all fields in sharding key
description.cn: 唯一索引必须包含分区键中的所有字段

description.en: There is no catalog address specified by user
search condition cannot match any records
description.cn: 搜索条件无法满足任何条件的匹配

description.en: index page is reorged and the pos got different lchild
description.cn: 索引页重组后指定位置存在不同左字节点

description.en: There are duplicate field name exists in the record
description.cn: 记录内含有重复字段名

description.en: Too many records to be inserted at once
description.cn: 插入操作尝试写入过多数据

description.en: Sort-Merge Join only supports equal predicates
description.cn: 合并连接只接受相等谓词
系统正在执行回滚操作

description.en: Bad record when doing sdb import
description.cn: 导入数据库时遇到无效的记录

description.en: have an error in sql syntax

description.cn: 索引被删除或非法状态
重复创建编目节点集群

description.en: log file is out of size
can not remove the only node in the group
description.cn: 不能删除组内唯一的节点

description.en: need to manually complete the cleanup
description.cn: 需要手工完成清理工作

description.en: can not remove node or group of catalog
description.cn: 不能删除编目节点和组

description.en: can not remove the group with data in it
description.cn: 不能删除存在数据的组

description.en: collection has not sharding index, can not split by percent
description.cn: 集合不存在分区键索引,不能按百分比分区

code.name:
SDB_TOO_MANY_TRACE_BP
too many trace break points are specified 跟踪断点数量过多

description.en: task already finished, can not be caceled
description.cn: 任务状态为完成，不允许被取消

description.en: routeID is different from the local
not all nodes are successful to export configuration
description.cn: 部分节点导出配置文件失败

description.en: this node is not primary and has no data
description.cn: 此节点不是主节点并且没有数据

description.en: secret value not same with data unit
description.cn: 索引文件特征值与数据文件不匹配

description.en: new boundary is conflict with the existing boundary
description.cn: 新增区间与现有区间冲突

description.en: the sharding-type of main-collection must be range
description.cn: 主表的分区类型必须是范围分区

description.en: there is no valid sharding-key field
description.cn: 未包含合法的分区键字段

description.en: the operation not support on main-collection
Reached the maximum number of nodes

description.cn: 节点处于业务故障状态

description.en: wait secondary nodes sync the operation failed
description.cn: 等待备节点同步该操作失败
文件描述符已达到上限

description.en: Rest recv size greater than max size
description.cn: Rest接收的大小超过设置的最大值

description.en: successfully done on catalog, but sth wrong happened when did it on data group.
description.cn: 在编目上执行成功但是由于某种原因导致在数据节点上执行失败

description.en: domain does not have any groups at all
description.cn: 域中不包含任何数据组
